name: Laceration Repair — Hand/Finger, Sutures

cptCodes.display: Simple repair of superficial wounds, ≤2.5 cm

diagnoses.display: Laceration without foreign body of unspecified finger without damage to nail, initial encounter

otherSuppliesUsed: 5-0 nylon, lidocaine 1% w/o epi for digital block
otherPostInstructions: Suture removal in 10–14 days; splint over joint if applicable
